g.text: Driving becomes signal in ~9 rounds. Putting takes ~48.

text.style: font-size: 10.5px; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans'; fill: #898781

g.text: Split-half reliability of a player's n-round strokes-gained average, PGA Tour 2017–26. Labeled: rounds to R = 0.5.

text.style: font-size: 10.5px; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans'; fill: #898781

g.text: Points: measured. Lines: fitted R(n) = n/(n+k); dotted where extrapolated beyond the measured grid.
